$comment: Vocational Disability Examiner headcount in Massachusetts DDS-Det (the SSA-claim adjudication division within MassAbility/MRC). Source: CTHRU (cthru.data.socrata.com, dataset rxhc-k6iz, chris='MRC'). Methodology: count of payroll records per calendar year; differs from SSA SAOR FTE-authorized counts. CTHRU is calendar year (Jan-Dec); SSA federal FY (Oct-Sep) values may differ slightly. CTHRU update lag: ~6+ months after CY end. CY 2024 not yet published as of 2026-05.

2016._note: reclassification year — both old (A/B/C/D) and new (I/II/III) titles in payroll concurrently
